channel.title: Made You A Mixtape
channel.description: A podcast that dissects one song per episode — its history, its sound, and the story of why it matters.
channel.itunes:author: Made You A Mixtape

item.title: Episode 06: Running Up That Hill — Kate Bush
item.description: A 1985 art-pop single, rejected as too strange for radio, that spent 44 years waiting for the internet to catch up.

item.title: Episode 05: Fast Car — Tracy Chapman
item.description: A debut single that took a busker's story straight to the top of the charts.

item.title: Episode 04: Ain't No Mountain High Enough — Marvin Gaye & Tammi Terrell
item.description: A Motown duet built on a house band that rarely got the credit.

item.title: Episode 03: Dancing Queen — ABBA
item.description: Seventeen vocal takes and a studio obsession with getting one word exactly right.

item.title: Episode 02: Golden Years — David Bowie
item.description: A reinvention, mid-decade, hiding inside a soul groove.

item.title: Episode 01: Dreams — Fleetwood Mac
item.description: The pilot episode. One take, almost.
